अनुपालन क琉 िविध के संबंध म犆 琇रपोटा榁धीन अविध के दौरान सरकार के िनद犇श, य琈द कोई ह犘: नोडल अिधकारी के ह瀡ता楹र (नाम तथा पदनाम तथा 琈दनांक) [फाइल संया वाई-18020/16/2018-सी ए पी] अण कुमार यादव, संयु"त सिचव MINISTRY OF STATISTICS AND PROGRAMME IMPLEMENTATION NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 13th September, 2018 S.O. 4857(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred under sub-rule (1) of rule 3 of the Collection of Statistics Rules, 2011,the Additional Director General handling statistical coordination in the Ministry of Statistics and Programme Implementation is hereby designated, with the approval of the competent authority, as the Nodal Officer for exercising powers and performing duties under the aforesaid rules. The nodal officer shall submit reports to the Central Government as required under clause (e), sub-rule (1) of rule 3 of the Rules in the manner prescribed below:- (1) Based on the material available with him on record, the nodal officer shall submit a report latest by the end of November, 2018, on the working of the Collection of Statistics Act 2008 and the Collection of Statistics Rules, 2011 during the period 16th May 2011, the date of commencement of the Collection of Statistics Rules, 2011 and 31stMarch, 2018. (2) For the financial years commencing with the year 2018-19, the nodal officer shall submit annual reports for each financial year in the format given in the Schedule to this Notification, latest by 30thSeptember of the subsequent financial year. -- 3 of 5 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] 2. The reports of the nodal officer and the directions, if any, of the Government issued to the nodal officer on the basis of the reports submitted shall be placed in the public domain from time to time. SCHEDULE Annual Report of nodal officer in the Government of India for the financial year _____ on the working of the Collection of Statistics Act 2008 and the Collection of Statistics Rules, 2011 1. No. of cases, out of cases mentioned at s. no. 3, in which disagreement along with reasons was furnished and the details thereof: 5. Details of delays, if any, in the process in respect of s. nos. 3 and 4, and reasons thereof: 6. No. of directions issued under section 3 of the Act and the Notifications received by the nodal officer: (i) Since start (16th May 2011): (ii) During the period under report: 8. No. of statistics officers appointed under section 4 of the Act and the notifications received by the nodal officer: (i) Since start (16th May 2011): (ii) During the period under report: 9. Whether a register of statistics officers [as required under clause (a) of sub-rule (1) of Rule 4 of the Rules] is being maintained in the office of the nodal officer in a digital database and if so, the summary details thereof and if not, the reasons thereof: 10. Whether information [as required under clause (b) of sub-rule (1) of Rule 4 of the Rules], on availability of statistics including unit-level data, whether collected under the provisions of the Act or not, with different Departments / as provided by nodal officers in the States / local governments in the State, as the case may be, is being maintained in a digital database and if so, the summary details thereof and if not, the reasons thereof: 11. Details of advice given by the nodal officer, in compliance to clause (c) of sub-rule (1) of rule 4 of the Rules, on steps to improve the statistical potential of administrative records: 12. Details of instructions issued by the nodal officer, in compliance to clause (d) of sub-rule (1) of rule 4 of the Rules, on promoting the sharing of statistical information including unit-level data and disputes/ differences of opinion, if any, resolved: 13. Details of reports, if any, obtained [as provided under clause (e) of sub-rule (2) of rule 4 of the Rules] from other Departments etc., on the working of the Act, for preparation of this report: 14. Details of complaints and prosecution cases, if any, reported to the nodal officer: 15. Details of any difficulty reported to the nodal officer, in implementing the provisions under the Collection of Statistics Act, 2008 and the Rules made thereunder, for any type of collection of statistics: 16. Details of Training/ sensitization programmes organized on implementation of the Collection of Statistics Act, 2008 and the Rules made thereunder and the no. of programmes in which the nodal officer participated: -- 4 of 5 -- ¹Hkkx IIμ[k.M 3(ii)º Hkkjr dk jkti=k % vlk/kj.k 5 17. Assessment of the nodal officer (on the basis of records) on the difficulties faced in implementation of the Collection of Statistics Act, 2008 and the Rules made thereunder and on making the law more effective: 18.
